description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house set on a rectangular green lawn with a swimming pool adjacent to one side. The house features a flat roof with rooftop amenities, including a red-tiled section and what appears to be a solar panel. The exterior is primarily white with large, dark-framed windows and multiple balconies, providing ample natural light and outdoor space. The structure is boxy and geometric, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation, characteristic of contemporary architecture. The pool is rectangular with rounded corners and is positioned close to the house, enhancing the outdoor living area. The property is surrounded by open grass, suggesting a suburban or upscale urban neighborhood setting.
description: A modern, white multi-story house with flat roofs, large windows, balconies, and an adjacent swimming pool on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with multiple balconies, large windows, and the swimming pool to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the boxy structure, flat roof, and minimal window openings on this side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional balconies, windows, and the swimming pool now on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the pool in the foreground and rooftop features visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple, modern door with minimal steps and no porch, emphasizing clean lines and functionality.
